title: Repository-local signing secret pattern
fix_summary: Remove plaintext signing secrets from local files and rotate credentials.

title: Android cleartext allowed globally without network security scoping
fix_summary: Add network security config and disable global cleartext by default.

title: Plain FTP transport across all platform backends
fix_summary: Introduce secure transport mode and constrain plaintext fallback usage.

title: Password propagation over HTTP via X-Password header
fix_summary: Move credential transport to secure channels and block insecure host paths by default.

title: Android backups enabled without explicit exclusion rules
fix_summary: Add backup policy rules or disable backup for sensitive app data.

title: Android diagnostics broadcast is globally observable
fix_summary: Replace global broadcast with scoped channel or permission-guarded receiver.

title: CI token permissions are broader than necessary
fix_summary: Reduce default workflow permissions and grant write only in release jobs.

title: GitHub Actions pinned to mutable tags not SHAs
fix_summary: Pin all third-party actions to immutable commit SHAs and maintain update cadence.

title: iOS CI installs tooling via unpinned curl pipe bash
fix_summary: Replace remote script execution with versioned checksum-verified install.

title: Dependabot configuration missing
fix_summary: Add Dependabot for npm workflows and platform dependency manifests.

title: Critical runtime vulnerability in basic-ftp
fix_summary: Upgrade basic-ftp to fixed version and gate runtime audits in CI.

title: iOS deployment and version metadata are inconsistent
fix_summary: Align Podfile deployment target with project settings and automate version fields.

title: Android release build keeps minification disabled
fix_summary: Enable release minification and resource shrinking with validated keep rules.

title: Android ABI policy includes emulator ABIs in default packaging
fix_summary: Split ABIs for release and retain emulator ABIs only for debug/test lanes.

title: Web runtime disables asset caching and has no service worker fallback
fix_summary: Serve hashed static assets with cache headers and keep no-store only for dynamic endpoints.

title: Web bundle size profile is high for first load
fix_summary: Reduce initial payload via route-level splitting and deferred WASM loading.

title: Browser zoom is disabled by viewport policy
fix_summary: Remove user-scalable restriction and validate high-zoom layouts.

title: Localization readiness is low
fix_summary: Introduce i18n framework and externalize user-visible strings incrementally.

title: Persistence adapters can silently reset state on mismatch
fix_summary: Add explicit schema migrations and recovery path instead of destructive fallback.

title: Coverage quality bar mismatch between CI and repository guidance
fix_summary: Align CI coverage threshold with documented branch coverage policy.

title: License metadata is inconsistent in docs
fix_summary: Align README badge and docs with GPLv3 license statement.

title: Android build verification could not complete in this environment
fix_summary: Rerun Android assemble checks in unrestricted environment and capture logs.

title: iOS local build command is not executable on Linux host
fix_summary: Use macOS CI as authoritative iOS build gate and document local limitation.
